text:
General Nathan was an American army general who appeared in the episode Get Schwifty as the main antagonist.

The original General Nathan presumably became a Cronenberg in the Cronenberged Dimension.

General Nathan was present during the Pentagon meeting after a giant alien head had appeared in the Earth's atmosphere causing heavy natural disasters. He wanted to destroy the Cromulons with nuclear weapons. The President disagreed instead giving Rick Sanchez and Morty a chance to perform a song for the Cromulon.

Later, General Nathan was still fixed on his idea to use nuclear weapons against the aliens and attempted a coup against the President by knocking him out and launching the nuclear weapons before Rick and Morty's second performance. However, Nathan's missiles proved to be ineffective against the aliens, only angering them. Rick and Morty's new song still managed to satisfy their Cromulon audience, nevertheless.

After the Cromulons left, General Nathan attempted to murder the President for likely no apparent reason expect for pure pettiness but is zapped by Rick using his particle beam wristwatch. The President showed no remorse for Nathan's death, instead laughing hysterically at the reveal Rick's wristwatch does not turn people into snakes and merely vaporizes them.

Despite his high rank and position, he's shown to be trigger-happy and not very bright, as he makes decisions without thinking of long term consequences. Examples of which he tried launching nuclear missiles at the Cromulons even though the aliens are shown to be much more bigger that their weapons are ineffective against them which nearly led to Earth's destruction. During his last moments he tried to assassinate the President while running through armed militia which wasn't smart as even if Rick didn't vaporize him, he still could've been shot by the militia for attempted assassination
